'''''Star Wars Weekly'' 94''' is the ninety-fourth issue in the ''[[Star Wars Weekly]]'' series of comic reprints, published on [[December 12]], [[1979]]. It included the original story "[[Way of the Wookiee!]]" by [[Archie Goodwin]].

==Contents==
*"[[Way of the Wookiee!]]"
*"Deathlok the Demolisher Part 6: Wasted by the War-Wolf!"
*"Guardians of the galaxy! Part 21: At war with Arcturus!"
*"Tales of the Watcher: Sabotage Mission Mars!"
